goal: After reboot/Abraham+PlayRoom — report Mac user, daemons, ports 4000/4140, tailscale, ogz paths
commands: REPORT=~/Desktop/ogz-knowledge/data/cursor_missions/artifacts/mac_environment_latest.txt; ROOT=~/Desktop/ogz-knowledge; [ -d "$ROOT" ] || ROOT=~/ogz-knowledge; REPORT="$ROOT/data/cursor_missions/artifacts/mac_environment_latest.txt"; { echo "# Mac environment — $(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)"; echo; echo "## User"; whoami; echo "HOME=$HOME"; echo; echo "## Host"; hostname; scutil --get ComputerName 2>/dev/null || true; echo; echo "## Tailscale"; (tailscale status 2>/dev/null | head -8) || echo 'tailscale not running'; echo; echo "## OGZ LaunchAgents (com.ogz.*)"; launchctl list 2>/dev/null | grep com.ogz || echo 'none'; echo; echo "## Abraham LaunchAgents (com.abraham.*)"; launchctl list 2>/dev/null | grep com.abraham || echo 'none'; echo; echo "## Ports"; (curl -sf -o /dev/null -w 'brain_4140=%{http_code}\n' http://127.0.0.1:4140/health 2>/dev/null) || echo 'brain_4140=down'; (curl -sf -o /dev/null -w 'playroom_4000=%{http_code}\n' http://127.0.0.1:4000/ 2>/dev/null) || echo 'playroom_4000=down'; echo; echo "## Repo"; ls -la "$ROOT" 2>/dev/null | head -5; echo; echo "## Keys"; test -f ~/.abraham_env && echo 'abraham_env=ok' || echo 'abraham_env=MISSING'; echo; echo "## Running missions"; ls "$ROOT/data/cursor_missions/running/" 2>/dev/null; echo; echo "## Pending missions"; ls "$ROOT/data/cursor_missions/pending/" 2>/dev/null; } | tee "$REPORT"
